original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of a dark page with typed text at the top. Two large, white, faded stamps reading "RESTRICTED" are visible—one at the top of the page and one in the center. Three hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin.

elements.description: A typed report with a paragraph detailing a radar contact made on April 18, 1948. The text includes distances (6,500 to 18,000 yards), velocity (30 m.p.h.), and weather conditions. The word 'RESTRICTED' is stamped twice at the top and bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Description A describes a photograph with stamps and hole-punch marks, while Description B describes typed text content (dates, distances, weather) and different stamp locations, indicating the descriptions are about different visual content or one is a hallucinated summary of text rather than visual elements.
